summary: Frontend testing completed for mobile layout fixes, React Query integration, serving selector with scaling API, and i18n support. All 16 test cases passed.

issues: DialogContent accessibility warning - missing DialogTitle for screen readers (minor - shows in console but doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: RecipePage.jsx correctly implements React Query with useRecipe hook for caching
Serving selector works with +/- buttons, API scaling via POST /api/ai/scale endpoint
Scaled ingredients display with burgundy text color (text-[#6A1F2E]) and background highlight (bg-[#6A1F2E]/5)
Reset button appears when servings differ from base and resets correctly
Mobile responsiveness verified: no horizontal overflow, flex-col stacking on ingredients, touch-friendly 36x36px buttons
i18n working correctly for Italian and French translations
Error state displays properly with 'Failed to load recipe' message for non-existent recipes
RecipeCard image heights responsive: 224px desktop (h-56), 160px mobile (h-40)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile layout fixes verified. Serving selector scales from 4 (default) to any value 1-50. Scaling API: POST /api/ai/scale?recipe_slug={slug}&target_servings={n}. Pizza Margherita base 4 servings: 500g flour -> 5 servings = 625g. React Query staleTime 10min. Console shows 401 for /api/favorites/status (expected for non-logged users).

verified_features.details: Page loads with hero image, title 'Pizza Margherita', history, ingredients, instructions sections

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Serving selector visible with +/- buttons
verified_features.details: Serving selector found with data-testid, initial value 4, decrease/increase buttons present

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Clicking + increases servings and scales ingredients via backend API
verified_features.details: Clicking + changes count from 4 to 5, ingredients scaled via API call

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Scaled ingredients show in red/highlighted color with correct amounts
verified_features.details: 625g flour, 500g tomatoes confirmed. Ingredients have text-[#6A1F2E] and bg-[#6A1F2E]/5 classes

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Reset button appears when scaled, clicking resets to original servings
verified_features.details: Reset button appears after scaling, clicking resets to 4 servings and button disappears

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Recipe page shows error state for non-existent recipe
verified_features.details: /en/recipe/this-does-not-exist-12345 shows 'Failed to load recipe' with 404 status code

verified_features.feature: MOBILE (375px): Recipe page hero section renders without horizontal overflow
MOBILE: Title text doesn't overflow (break-words applied)
verified_features.details: Title 'Pizza Margherita' renders correctly without overflow

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Serving selector is touch-friendly (h-9 w-9 buttons)
verified_features.details: Buttons measured at 36x36px - meets touch-friendly criteria (>=32px)

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Ingredients list stacks label/amount vertically (flex-col sm:flex-row)
verified_features.details: flex-direction: column confirmed on mobile viewport

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Instructions section renders correctly with proper spacing
verified_features.details: 7 instruction steps found, proper spacing visible in screenshot

verified_features.feature: MOBILE: Navigation collapses correctly with hamburger menu
verified_features.details: Mobile menu trigger found, drawer opens with Explore, Techniques, Menu Builder, About, Login options

verified_features.feature: DESKTOP: Explore page /en/explore works with search and filters
verified_features.details: 24 recipe cards loaded, search input found, Dish Type and Continent filters present
Homepage loads with navigation, search bar, featured recipe section

verified_features.feature: i18n: Recipe page works in Italian /it/recipe/pizza-margherita-italy
verified_features.details: Italian words found: Storia, Ingredienti, Istruzioni, Italia, Porzioni. Navigation shows Esplora, Tecniche, etc.

verified_features.feature: i18n: Recipe page works in French /fr/recipe/pizza-margherita-italy
verified_features.details: French navigation: Explorer, Techniques, Créateur de Menu, À Propos, Connexion

verified_features.feature: RecipeCard on explore page has responsive image heights (h-40 sm:h-56)

notes: Console warnings: 1) DialogContent accessibility warning for mobile nav (doesn't affect functionality), 2) UNSAFE_componentWillMount from react-helmet (third-party). 401 errors for /api/favorites/status expected for non-authenticated users.
